zh.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude de Vaux於大約1225年出生在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德時，她的父親Hubert de Vaux36歲，母親Margaret Aline de Burgh21歲。她於1240年與Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland在英國英格蘭波藍德易爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1293年5月28日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude de Vaux于大约1225年出生在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德时，她的父亲Hubert de Vaux36岁，母亲Margaret Aline de Burgh21岁。她于1240年与Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland在英国英格兰波藍德易爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1293年5月28日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude de Vaux was born about 1225, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, her father, Hubert de Vaux, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Aline de Burgh, was 21. She married Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland in 1240, in Irthington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 28 May 1293, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude de Vaux est née environ 1225, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hubert de Vaux, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Aline de Burgh, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland en 1240, à Irthington, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 28 mai 1293, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude de Vaux um 1225 in Gilsland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert de Vaux 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Aline de Burgh 21. Sie hat 1240 in Irthington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 28. Mai 1293 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maude de Vaux è nata il circa 1225 nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Hubert de Vaux, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Aline de Burgh, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland nel 1240, nel Irthington, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 28 maggio 1293, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランド

ja.lifeSummary: Maude de Vauxが約1225年にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで生まれた時，父Hubert de Vauxは36歳，母Margaret Aline de Burghは21歳であった。1240年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドイルスイントンでThomas de Moulton I of Gilslandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1293年5月28日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude de Vaux(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert de Vaux(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Aline de Burgh(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 이르스잉턴에서 Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 5월 28일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1225–before 28 May 1293: ойролцоогоор 1225 он–1293 оны Тавдугаар сарын 28–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude de Vaux nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hubert de Vaux, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Aline de Burgh, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland em 1240, em Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 28 de maio de 1293, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude de Vaux родилась около 1225 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hubert de Vaux было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Aline de Burgh, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland в 1240 г. в местности иртингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 28 май 1293 г. в её родном городе.

sm.about 1225–before 28 May 1293: e tusa o le 1225–a'e le'I oo le 28 Me 1293

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maude de Vaux nació aproximadamente 1225, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hubert de Vaux, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Aline de Burgh, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas de Moulton I of Gilsland en 1240, en Irthington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 28 de mayo de 1293, en su pueblo.
